edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9991367d4672
edges.original_sentence: Both herbicide and clipping significantly reduced the cover of A. cristatum, but clipping produced an immediate and consistent decrease, whereas herbicide control varied among years.

source_spans.text: Both herbicide and clipping significantly reduced the cover of A. cristatum, but clipping produced an immediate and consistent decrease, whereas herbicide control varied among years.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:ba14efb933dd
edges.original_sentence: The cover of B. gracilis increased significantly with seed addition and herbicide, and, after 7 years, was similar to that in undisturbed prairie.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:279affe77398
edges.original_sentence: The cover of A. cristatum decreased significantly with increasing cover of a seeded native grass, B. gracilis, suggesting that both top-down (i.e., grazing) and bottom-up (i.e., resource competition) strategies can contribute to A. cristatum control.

source_spans.text: The cover of A. cristatum decreased significantly with increasing cover of a seeded native grass, B. gracilis, suggesting that both top-down (i.e., grazing) and bottom-up (i.e., resource competition) strategies can contribute to A. cristatum control.

source_document.title: Extirpation or Coexistence? Management of a Persistent Introduced Grass in a Prairie Restoration

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:ba14efb933dd
edges.original_sentence: The cover of A. cristatum in 2000 was significantly ( p < 0.05, df = 1, 16 for all three-factor ANOVAs) lower in plots receiving herbicide (Fig. 1, F = 46.83) and clipping (F = 18.50) but was unaffected by the addition of native seeds (F = 1.19).

source_spans.text: The cover of A. cristatum in 2000 was significantly ( p < 0.05, df = 1, 16 for all three-factor ANOVAs) lower in plots receiving herbicide (Fig. 1, F = 46.83) and clipping (F = 18.50) but was unaffected by the addition of native seeds (F = 1.19).

source_document.title: Extirpation or Coexistence? Management of a Persistent Introduced Grass in a Prairie Restoration

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9991367d4672
edges.original_sentence: The density of A. cristatum seed heads did not vary significantly between control and herbicide plots in 1998 but was three times higher in plots receiving herbicide (42 seed heads/m2) than in untreated controls (12/m2).

source_spans.text: The density of A. cristatum seed heads did not vary significantly between control and herbicide plots in 1998 but was three times higher in plots receiving herbicide (42 seed heads/m2) than in untreated controls (12/m2).

source_document.title: Extirpation or Coexistence? Management of a Persistent Introduced Grass in a Prairie Restoration

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9991367d4672
edges.original_sentence: Seed head density was significantly reduced by herbicide in 1999 (control, 70/m2; herbicide, 2/m2; F = 8.37) and was unaffected in 2000 (control, 1.4/m2; herbicide, 1.8/m2).

source_spans.text: Seed head density was significantly reduced by herbicide in 1999 (control, 70/m2; herbicide, 2/m2; F = 8.37) and was unaffected in 2000 (control, 1.4/m2; herbicide, 1.8/m2).

source_document.title: Extirpation or Coexistence? Management of a Persistent Introduced Grass in a Prairie Restoration
